name: wp-fullstack-dev
description: A production-aware WordPress engineering skill with starters, project mapping, site-level conflict auditing, systematic debugging, validation, packaging, and specialist references.

interface.longDescription: Scaffold, modify, debug, audit, test, validate, and package modern WordPress plugins, themes, blocks, dashboards, APIs, and WooCommerce extensions. Includes a static project mapper with cross-component conflict and lifecycle-risk detection, a root-cause-first debugging methodology, a browser runtime audit for JS/React/CSS errors, and evidence-based validation gates.
defaultPrompt: Build a React WordPress admin dashboard.
Audit this WordPress project and verify it.
Debug this WordPress issue: find the root cause before fixing.
Map this site's components and find layering conflicts.
